items.name: breath-cycle
items.description: Sessions have 3 phases: inhale (automated boot), hold (work — context monitored automatically), exhale (write preload, commit, say FLUSH COMPLETE → system offers auto-continue). Never skip exhale.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Sessions have 3 phases: inhale (automated boot), hold (work — context monitored automatically), exhale (write preload, commit, say FLUSH COMPLETE → system offers auto-continue). Never skip exhale.

items.name: community-safe
items.description: Community assets must never contain private data. No emails, paths, secrets, tokens, user-specific references. Private data belongs in USER.md, .env, .soma/secrets/, project memory. Muscles encode patterns, not personal context.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Community assets must never contain private data. No emails, paths, secrets, tokens, user-specific references. Private data belongs in USER.md, .env, .soma/secrets/, project memory. Muscles encode patterns, not personal context.

items.name: content-triage
items.description: New AMPS content gets classified: bundled (ships with Soma), hub (on SomaHub), workspace (project-local), or internal (dev tooling). Scope determines distribution. Tier determines trust.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: New AMPS content gets classified: bundled (ships with Soma), hub (on SomaHub), workspace (project-local), or internal (dev tooling). Scope determines distribution. Tier determines trust.

items.name: frontmatter-standard
items.description: All .md files get YAML frontmatter: type, status, created, updated. 8 statuses: draft/active/stable/stale/archived/deprecated/blocked/review. 12 types: plan/spec/note/index/memory/muscle/protocol/decision/log/template/identity/config.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: All .md files get YAML frontmatter: type, status, created, updated. 8 statuses: draft/active/stable/stale/archived/deprecated/blocked/review. 12 types: plan/spec/note/index/memory/muscle/protocol/decision/log/template/identity/config.

items.name: git-identity
items.description: Commits must be attributed correctly. Check git config user.email before first commit in any repo. Define identity zones (personal, business, agent) and enforce them.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Commits must be attributed correctly. Check git config user.email before first commit in any repo. Define identity zones (personal, business, agent) and enforce them.

items.name: heat-tracking
items.description: Protocols have temperature: cold (0-2, not loaded), warm (3-7, breadcrumb in prompt), hot (8+, full in prompt). Heat auto-detected from tool results. Manual: /pin (hot), /kill (cold). Decays -1 per unused session.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Protocols have temperature: cold (0-2, not loaded), warm (3-7, breadcrumb in prompt), hot (8+, full in prompt). Heat auto-detected from tool results. Manual: /pin (hot), /kill (cold). Decays -1 per unused session.

items.name: pattern-evolution
items.description: Patterns mature through AMPS layers: Skills → Muscles → Protocols → Automations. Muscles grow from gaps noticed during work. Repetition builds heat fast. Mature patterns crystallize into the system.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Patterns mature through AMPS layers: Skills → Muscles → Protocols → Automations. Muscles grow from gaps noticed during work. Repetition builds heat fast. Mature patterns crystallize into the system.

items.name: quality-standards
items.description: Deletion is irreversible — move or archive. Protect critical files. Clean commits with descriptive messages. Know which branch deploys. Atomic commits — one concern each.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Deletion is irreversible — move or archive. Protect critical files. Clean commits with descriptive messages. Know which branch deploys. Atomic commits — one concern each.

items.name: session-checkpoints
items.description: Two-track version control: .soma/ is committed every exhale (local-only git), project code gets lightweight checkpoints (local commits/tags, never pushed raw). Ship by squashing checkpoints into clean commits. On inhale, diff both tracks to see what changed.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Two-track version control: .soma/ is committed every exhale (local-only git), project code gets lightweight checkpoints (local commits/tags, never pushed raw). Ship by squashing checkpoints into clean commits. On inhale, diff both tracks to see what changed.

items.name: tool-discipline
items.description: Read before edit (never cat/sed). Prefer grep/find/ls over bash for exploration. Edit for surgical changes, write only for new files. Batch independent calls. Output plain text — don't cat/bash to display results.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Read before edit (never cat/sed). Prefer grep/find/ls over bash for exploration. Edit for surgical changes, write only for new files. Batch independent calls. Output plain text — don't cat/bash to display results.

items.name: working-style
items.description: Be direct — no ceremony. Lead with action. Understand before you change, verify after you build. Complex work gets a plan first. Plans live in files, not in context.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Be direct — no ceremony. Lead with action. Understand before you change, verify after you build. Complex work gets a plan first. Plans live in files, not in context.

items.name: icon-audit
items.description: Browse icon libraries, extract SVGs, build numbered comparison pages, and screenshot for visual AI review.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Browse icon libraries, extract SVGs, build numbered comparison pages, and screenshot for visual AI review.

items.name: micro-exhale
items.description: Write workflow summaries to daily log after major completions — one file per day, always append.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Write workflow summaries to daily log after major completions — one file per day, always append.

items.name: test-hygiene
items.description: Validate tests aren't stale after any code removal, rename, or restructure. Run all suites, grep for orphaned references, check pass counts. Dead tests are worse than no tests.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Validate tests aren't stale after any code removal, rename, or restructure. Run all suites, grep for orphaned references, check pass counts. Dead tests are worse than no tests.

items.name: architect
items.description: Structure-focused agent for engineering teams — code review, standards enforcement, documentation-first
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: core
items.description: Default Soma setup — breath cycle, heat tracking, and clean memory structure. What every agent starts with.
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: devops
items.description: Ops-focused agent for deployment, CI/CD, and infrastructure work — verify before deploy, automate everything
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: writer
items.description: Writing-focused agent for technical content, blogging, and documentation — accuracy first, honest voice
items.author: meetsoma
